title: Tribunus Identity Manifest v1
description: Schema defining the canonical identity manifest for the Tribunus project. Used to declare naming conventions, platform identifiers, and contact information across the entire Tribunus ecosystem.

canonicalProductName.description: The primary, authoritative product name. Used everywhere a human-readable product identifier is needed.

canonicalRepository.description: The canonical GitHub repository in owner/repo format.

canonicalDomain.description: The primary domain for the project, used in URLs, email addresses, and branding.

canonicalExecutable.description: The name of the main compiled binary or executable entry point.

canonicalCliInvocation.description: The CLI command invocation string used to launch the tool.

canonicalProjectDir.description: The hidden directory name created by the tool in a user's home or project root.

canonicalConfigFile.description: The default configuration file name used across the project.

canonicalEnvPrefix.description: The prefix applied to all environment variables defined by the project.

canonicalProtocolScheme.description: The URI scheme for internal or canonical protocol handlers.

canonicalHttpHeaderPrefix.description: The prefix applied to custom HTTP headers defined by the project.

canonicalPackageScope.description: The NPM or package manager scope used for published packages.

desktopProductName.description: The product name as it appears in desktop UI (menus, title bars, notifications).

desktopBundleId.description: The reverse-DNS bundle identifier used for macOS, Electron, and platform packaging.

desktopAppSupportDir.description: The relative path under the user's app support directory where the desktop app stores data.

displayContact.description: The public contact email address for general inquiries.

securityContact.description: The email address for responsible security disclosures.

supportUrl.description: The URL users should visit for support, documentation, or issue tracking.

docsRoot.description: The root URL for all project documentation.

updateEndpoint.description: The HTTPS endpoint used for checking and downloading application updates.

deepLinkScheme.description: The URI scheme registered for deep linking into the desktop application.

userAgentPrefix.description: The prefix used in User-Agent header values sent by official project components.

artifactPrefix.description: The prefix for published release artifact filenames and identifiers.

telemetryNamespace.description: The namespace under which telemetry events, spans, and metrics are emitted.

releaseNamingPattern.description: A template pattern for release artifact filenames. Supports placeholders such as {platform}, {arch}, {version}, and {ext}.

version.description: The version of this identity manifest, following semver.

displayStrings.description: Optional human-readable strings for product presentation and marketing materials.

tagline.description: A short, memorable tagline describing the product at a glance.

shortDescription.description: A one- or two-sentence description of the product's purpose and value.
